title: Clico
description_en: Clico is a powerful Browser extension designed to be your ultimate writing and productivity partner. Unlike traditional AI tools that require you to copy and paste text back and forth, Clico lives directly inside your browser. It reads and understands the context of the webpage you are currently viewing, allowing it to perform tasks with an unmatched level of relevance and intelligence.
description_zh: Clico is a powerful Browser extension designed to be your ultimate writing and productivity partner. Unlike traditional AI tools that require you to copy and paste text back and forth, Clico lives directly inside your browser. It reads and understands the context of the webpage you are currently viewing, allowing it to perform tasks with an unmatched level of relevance and intelligence.

title: SUN
description_en: SUN creates interactive audio content on demand. Generate podcasts, audiobooks, or courses on any topic, ask questions while listening, and learn in the context of your life. Unlike static platforms, SUN understands your world—from notes, emails, and AI tools—to deliver truly personalized audio experiences. Built for continuous, screen-free learning that helps you grow every day.
description_zh: SUN creates interactive audio content on demand. Generate podcasts, audiobooks, or courses on any topic, ask questions while listening, and learn in the context of your life. Unlike static platforms, SUN understands your world—from notes, emails, and AI tools—to deliver truly personalized audio experiences. Built for continuous, screen-free learning that helps you grow every day.

title: Sheet Ninja
description_en: Sheet Ninja turns any Google Sheet into a live API in seconds. Your data already exists. Stop rebuilding it in clunky databases. Paste a link, get endpoints. Build with Lovable, Bolt, or Replit and your data stays in Sheets. Your clients edit like a spreadsheet. Your app reflects it instantly. No backend, no redeployments, no calls from confused clients.
description_zh: Sheet Ninja turns any Google Sheet into a live API in seconds. Your data already exists. Stop rebuilding it in clunky databases. Paste a link, get endpoints. Build with Lovable, Bolt, or Replit and your data stays in Sheets. Your clients edit like a spreadsheet. Your app reflects it instantly. No backend, no redeployments, no calls from confused clients.

title: Google Search Live
description_en: Google is expanding Search Live globally which was teased during the event last year, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
description_zh: Google is expanding Search Live globally which was teased during the event last year, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.

title: Parallel Code
description_en: Parallel Code is a macOS app that gives every AI coding agent its own git branch and worktree — automatically. Use Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini in parallel. Free and open source.
description_zh: Parallel Code is a macOS app that gives every AI coding agent its own git branch and worktree — automatically. Use Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini in parallel. Free and open source.

title: Cline Kanban
description_en: Cline Kanban brings your agents out of the terminal and into the board. Create, manage, and chain agent tasks within a single view. Claude Code and Codex compatible.
description_zh: Cline Kanban brings your agents out of the terminal and into the board. Create, manage, and chain agent tasks within a single view. Claude Code and Codex compatible.

title: Peopling
description_en: Most managers learn to have hard conversations by having them badly. Peopling gives you a private space to practice.AI-powered voice roleplay for the conversations that actually matter: the feedback you've been avoiding, the alignment talk you keep rescheduling, the 1:1 that's quietly going sideways. Built by a coach who's worked with engineers and managers across Stripe, Netflix, Roblox, Headspace, and more. Less theory. More reps.
description_zh: Most managers learn to have hard conversations by having them badly. Peopling gives you a private space to practice.AI-powered voice roleplay for the conversations that actually matter: the feedback you've been avoiding, the alignment talk you keep rescheduling, the 1:1 that's quietly going sideways. Built by a coach who's worked with engineers and managers across Stripe, Netflix, Roblox, Headspace, and more. Less theory. More reps.

title: Pensieve
description_en: AI agents are getting smarter, but they still don't understand your business. Every conversation starts with copy-pasting context and re-explaining the backstory. MCP gives agents tool access. Pensieve gives them understanding. We connect your tools and build a living picture of your organisation. People, projects, decisions, customers and how they all relate. Agents reason over the full picture and surface what nobody sees alone. Free. Bring your own Anthropic, OpenAI or Google inference.
description_zh: AI agents are getting smarter, but they still don't understand your business. Every conversation starts with copy-pasting context and re-explaining the backstory. MCP gives agents tool access. Pensieve gives them understanding. We connect your tools and build a living picture of your organisation. People, projects, decisions, customers and how they all relate. Agents reason over the full picture and surface what nobody sees alone. Free. Bring your own Anthropic, OpenAI or Google inference.

title: GuideYou
description_en: GuideYou helps you create simple visual step-by-step guides your family can follow without calling you every time. Upload screenshots, highlight what to tap, and share guides in a family workspace. Works on any device, supports feedback when screens change, and stays signed in for easy access. Explain things once and let others follow anytime.
description_zh: GuideYou helps you create simple visual step-by-step guides your family can follow without calling you every time. Upload screenshots, highlight what to tap, and share guides in a family workspace. Works on any device, supports feedback when screens change, and stays signed in for easy access. Explain things once and let others follow anytime.

title: CodingPrep
description_en: CodePrep helps you practice coding interviews in a way that actually feels useful. Instead of grinding random problems, you can talk through solutions, write code, get tested, ask for hints, and receive clear feedback on what to improve. It includes voice mode, built-in code execution, study mode, and progress tracking, so you can practice like a real interview and get better faster.
description_zh: CodePrep helps you practice coding interviews in a way that actually feels useful. Instead of grinding random problems, you can talk through solutions, write code, get tested, ask for hints, and receive clear feedback on what to improve. It includes voice mode, built-in code execution, study mode, and progress tracking, so you can practice like a real interview and get better faster.

title: VibecodedHub
description_en: The vibe coding movement ships real products every week. They get posted once and disappear, no discovery layer exists for this category. VibecodedHub fixes that. Submit your AI-built project, share your build story and tools, and get discovered by a community that gets how it was made. Built with Next.js, Prisma, Stripe, and Claude Code. The platform is the first project posted on its own feed.
description_zh: The vibe coding movement ships real products every week. They get posted once and disappear, no discovery layer exists for this category. VibecodedHub fixes that. Submit your AI-built project, share your build story and tools, and get discovered by a community that gets how it was made. Built with Next.js, Prisma, Stripe, and Claude Code. The platform is the first project posted on its own feed.

title: Struere
description_en: Struere turns your spreadsheets into live dashboards, automated alerts, and workflows using AI. Built for teams who have outgrown Excel but are not ready for complex and expensive enterprise software.
description_zh: Struere turns your spreadsheets into live dashboards, automated alerts, and workflows using AI. Built for teams who have outgrown Excel but are not ready for complex and expensive enterprise software.

title: talk.
description_en: It’s a platform where you can share your time, help others, and get paid for it. It’s for engineers, students, creators, founders, doctors… basically everyone.
description_zh: It’s a platform where you can share your time, help others, and get paid for it. It’s for engineers, students, creators, founders, doctors… basically everyone.

title: GetNextRole
description_en: GetNextRole uses AI to optimize your resume, generate cover letters, match you to jobs across 20+ boards, track applications, and prepare you for interviews. Everything job seekers need in one free platform. Auto-apply coming soon.
description_zh: GetNextRole uses AI to optimize your resume, generate cover letters, match you to jobs across 20+ boards, track applications, and prepare you for interviews. Everything job seekers need in one free platform. Auto-apply coming soon.

title: PackGoat
description_en: PackGoat is a packing list app for people who hate packing. Create reusable templates so you never start your packing list from scratch. Build a "Toiletries" list once, reuse it every trip. Smart quantities adjust to your trip length. Set "2 per day" for socks, change your trip from a weekend to a week, and the quantities update automatically. Know exactly how heavy your bag is before you leave with real-time weight tracking. No more overweight baggage fees or surprises at the airport scale.
description_zh: PackGoat is a packing list app for people who hate packing. Create reusable templates so you never start your packing list from scratch. Build a "Toiletries" list once, reuse it every trip. Smart quantities adjust to your trip length. Set "2 per day" for socks, change your trip from a weekend to a week, and the quantities update automatically. Know exactly how heavy your bag is before you leave with real-time weight tracking. No more overweight baggage fees or surprises at the airport scale.

title: Compeddit — Reddit Competitor Monitor
description_en: Compeddit Catch buying signals before your competitors even know they're losing customers. Get instant Telegram alerts when people complain about their service, compare them to others, or admit they're ready to switch. One user intercepted a 847-upvote thread looking for alternatives and closed 12 deals in 48 hours. get complete dashboard of all your competitors and stay 2 steps ahead.
description_zh: Compeddit Catch buying signals before your competitors even know they're losing customers. Get instant Telegram alerts when people complain about their service, compare them to others, or admit they're ready to switch. One user intercepted a 847-upvote thread looking for alternatives and closed 12 deals in 48 hours. get complete dashboard of all your competitors and stay 2 steps ahead.

title: GitWhy
description_en: GitWhy is the context layer for git that captures the prompt, reasoning, decisions, and changed files from Claude Code, Cursor, and other coding agents, tied to the commits that produced them. Share that context with your team and surface it directly in GitHub PRs for faster, clearer reviews.
description_zh: GitWhy is the context layer for git that captures the prompt, reasoning, decisions, and changed files from Claude Code, Cursor, and other coding agents, tied to the commits that produced them. Share that context with your team and surface it directly in GitHub PRs for faster, clearer reviews.

title: Shatranj.live
description_en: Following professional chess online is fragmented. FIDE's site is clunky, broadcasts lack context, and tournament data is scattered across five different sources. Shatranj Live brings it all together — real-time standings, live game viewer with move-by-move analysis, FIDE ratings, player profiles, and editorial coverage. Currently tracking the FIDE Candidates 2026 in Cyprus — the tournament that decides who challenges World Champion Gukesh. Free, fast, and built by chess fans for chess fans.
description_zh: Following professional chess online is fragmented. FIDE's site is clunky, broadcasts lack context, and tournament data is scattered across five different sources. Shatranj Live brings it all together — real-time standings, live game viewer with move-by-move analysis, FIDE ratings, player profiles, and editorial coverage. Currently tracking the FIDE Candidates 2026 in Cyprus — the tournament that decides who challenges World Champion Gukesh. Free, fast, and built by chess fans for chess fans.

title: Easy Quran AI
description_en: Easy Quran AI brings audiobook, recitation, kids Quran, and word-by-word translation into one seamless experience. With support for 18 languages, it makes the Quran accessible to everyone. Unlike traditional apps, it focuses on listening, learning, and deep understanding. With AI, it’s evolving to generate translation audio and Surah videos with translation.
description_zh: Easy Quran AI brings audiobook, recitation, kids Quran, and word-by-word translation into one seamless experience. With support for 18 languages, it makes the Quran accessible to everyone. Unlike traditional apps, it focuses on listening, learning, and deep understanding. With AI, it’s evolving to generate translation audio and Surah videos with translation.

title: DESIGNmd
description_en: DESIGNmd is a free library of DESIGN.md files - a new markdown format by Google that captures complete design systems (colors, typography, spacing, components) in a single file. Drop one in your project and any AI coding tool - Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity - builds consistent UI from it. Browse by style, color, or tags. Download with one click, or pull directly into your editor using the MCP server or CLI.
description_zh: DESIGNmd is a free library of DESIGN.md files - a new markdown format by Google that captures complete design systems (colors, typography, spacing, components) in a single file. Drop one in your project and any AI coding tool - Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Antigravity - builds consistent UI from it. Browse by style, color, or tags. Download with one click, or pull directly into your editor using the MCP server or CLI.

title: Runa AI
description_en: Runa plugs into your product and gives every user an AI that actually does things not just answers questions. Natural language in. Real product actions out. Built for teams who are tired of users getting stuck.
description_zh: Runa plugs into your product and gives every user an AI that actually does things not just answers questions. Natural language in. Real product actions out. Built for teams who are tired of users getting stuck.

title: PromptGPT by VosuAI
description_en: Prompting shouldn’t feel like guesswork. The current approach is slow, messy, hard to scale, and often wastes ton of credits and money on trial and error. PromptGPT by VosuAI lets you visually build prompts for images, videos, and music, save and reuse workflows, keep your best prompt structures organized, and create faster with more control and more consistent results.
description_zh: Prompting shouldn’t feel like guesswork. The current approach is slow, messy, hard to scale, and often wastes ton of credits and money on trial and error. PromptGPT by VosuAI lets you visually build prompts for images, videos, and music, save and reuse workflows, keep your best prompt structures organized, and create faster with more control and more consistent results.

title: Every Minute A Startup
description_en: A new AI-generated startup every 60 seconds. Each one gets built into a real working app. Vote for your favorites.
description_zh: A new AI-generated startup every 60 seconds. Each one gets built into a real working app. Vote for your favorites.

title: HolyStitch
description_en: Stitch by Google exports one HTML file per screen. HolyStitch bridges the gap to production. It's an MCP tool that reads your Stitch project from the API and writes a complete Next.js project to disk in under 5 seconds. No AI in the loop — pure deterministic compiler. → Splits screens into React components with correct hierarchy → Extracts your exact Tailwind theme → Deduplicates shared components → Works in Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf
description_zh: Stitch by Google exports one HTML file per screen. HolyStitch bridges the gap to production. It's an MCP tool that reads your Stitch project from the API and writes a complete Next.js project to disk in under 5 seconds. No AI in the loop — pure deterministic compiler. → Splits screens into React components with correct hierarchy → Extracts your exact Tailwind theme → Deduplicates shared components → Works in Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf

title: Daily Diary: Void
description_en: Pick your emotional state (focused, etc.) and get a prompt designed to unlock that exact headspace. No fluff. No cute illustrations. - Emotion-based prompts - Streak tracking that doesn't guilt-trip you - minute breathing pause after writing (optional) - your thoughts never leave your device - Dark-first design built for late-night reflection Stop scrolling. Start reflecting. Built for anyone tired of apps that treat journaling like a chore.
description_zh: Pick your emotional state (focused, etc.) and get a prompt designed to unlock that exact headspace. No fluff. No cute illustrations. - Emotion-based prompts - Streak tracking that doesn't guilt-trip you - minute breathing pause after writing (optional) - your thoughts never leave your device - Dark-first design built for late-night reflection Stop scrolling. Start reflecting. Built for anyone tired of apps that treat journaling like a chore.

title: MyFreelancerMate
description_en: The all-in-one operating system for freelancers and small agencies. MyFreelancerMate bridges the gap between project execution and financial health by consolidating your CRM, kanban tracking, and professional invoicing into one high-performance workspace. Protect your work with proprietary "Stealth-View" file sharing and gain real-time clarity on your income and pending deposits. Stop the administrative overhead and focus on your actual craft.
description_zh: The all-in-one operating system for freelancers and small agencies. MyFreelancerMate bridges the gap between project execution and financial health by consolidating your CRM, kanban tracking, and professional invoicing into one high-performance workspace. Protect your work with proprietary "Stealth-View" file sharing and gain real-time clarity on your income and pending deposits. Stop the administrative overhead and focus on your actual craft.

title: DailyDoze - Learn Daily
description_en: DailyDoze helps you learn consistently without overwhelm. Instead of long courses and endless content, it delivers one high-quality concept every day. Topics are curated for clarity and real understanding, not noise. With a clean, distraction-free experience, DailyDoze makes daily learning simple, focused, and sustainable.
description_zh: DailyDoze helps you learn consistently without overwhelm. Instead of long courses and endless content, it delivers one high-quality concept every day. Topics are curated for clarity and real understanding, not noise. With a clean, distraction-free experience, DailyDoze makes daily learning simple, focused, and sustainable.

title: ResumeChiefz
description_en: Most resume builders are made by designers. ResumeChiefz was built by a 10-year recruiting veteran who screened thousands of resumes and watched qualified candidates get rejected by ATS systems. ResumeChiefz gives you an ATS score on every resume, a cover letter generator, and a LinkedIn optimizer — all included. No ads, no upsells, no fluff. Free to start. Pro at $7.99 one-time or $12.99/mo. Cheaper than every major competitor.
description_zh: Most resume builders are made by designers. ResumeChiefz was built by a 10-year recruiting veteran who screened thousands of resumes and watched qualified candidates get rejected by ATS systems. ResumeChiefz gives you an ATS score on every resume, a cover letter generator, and a LinkedIn optimizer — all included. No ads, no upsells, no fluff. Free to start. Pro at $7.99 one-time or $12.99/mo. Cheaper than every major competitor.

title: Elleven AI 26
description_en: Record meetings, summarize any video or article, and manage your tasks — all with on-device AI. No cloud. Works offline. Syncs across all your Apple devices.
description_zh: Record meetings, summarize any video or article, and manage your tasks — all with on-device AI. No cloud. Works offline. Syncs across all your Apple devices.

title: WartungsPlaner
description_en: WartungsPlaner is your personal service book for cars, homes, and appliances. It uses weather data for smart reminders — winter tire alerts when temps drop below 7°C, heating maintenance in summer before technicians are booked. Includes predefined templates for inspections, a warranty tracker with expiry warnings, cost tracking with charts, and PDF service book export for car sales. 100% offline, no cloud, no tracking.
description_zh: WartungsPlaner is your personal service book for cars, homes, and appliances. It uses weather data for smart reminders — winter tire alerts when temps drop below 7°C, heating maintenance in summer before technicians are booked. Includes predefined templates for inspections, a warranty tracker with expiry warnings, cost tracking with charts, and PDF service book export for car sales. 100% offline, no cloud, no tracking.

title: fastfetch-cli/fastfetch
description_en: A maintained, feature-rich and performance oriented, neofetch like system information tool.
description_zh: Fastfetch 是一款类似 neofetch 的系统信息展示工具，主力用 C 编写，强调性能与可定制性，可在 Linux、macOS、Windows 8.1+、Android 以及多种 BSD 等平台运行。官方主要在 x86-64 和 aarch64 上进行测试，其他架构可能可用但不保证。它支持用 JSONC 配置，并建议尽量使用最新版本（部分发行版仓库可能打包较旧）。

title: shanraisshan/claude-code-best-practice
description_en: practice made claude perfect
description_zh: 这段内容像是一个名为“practice makes claude perfect / claude-code-best-practice”的资料索引或仓库目录，核心在介绍用 Command→Agent→Skill 的编排模式，以及通用的开发流程框架 Research→Plan→Execute→Review→Ship。它还汇总了多种工作流（含跨模型、Ralph Wiggum Loop 等）与大量分类的技巧条目，并引用了 Boris Cherny 等人在 X 上的相关分享。末尾列出了一些关于 CLAUDE.md 该写什么、是否需要额外规则文件、如何更新以及为何会被忽略等常见问题，但未给出具体答案。

title: microsoft/VibeVoice
description_en: Open-Source Frontier Voice AI
description_zh: VibeVoice 是一个开源语音 AI 方向的研究框架，包含语音识别 VibeVoice‑ASR 与实时文本转语音 VibeVoice‑Realtime‑0.5B 等组件。VibeVoice‑ASR 于 2026-01 开源，主打可一次性处理最长 60 分钟音频并输出带说话人、时间戳与内容的结构化转写，支持 50+ 语言、可自定义上下文，并提供微调代码与 vLLM 加速推理。2026-03 起它已集成进 Hugging Face Transformers，且被社区用于构建名为 Vibing 的语音输入法（提供 macOS/Windows 下载）。2025-12 还发布了带多语种与多风格说话人的实验性 TTS 语音库，并提到曾发现被不符合其初衷的方式使用，强调负责任使用原则。

title: luongnv89/claude-howto
description_en: A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.
description_zh: 这段内容在推介一套以可视化示例为核心的 Claude Code 学习指南，主打“周末掌握”，并提供 15 分钟快速上手与分级学习路径。它指出官方文档偏功能罗列、缺少将斜杠命令、hooks、记忆、子代理、MCP 等组合成高效工作流的实战范式，导致用户无法系统进阶。该指南承诺用模块化教程、可直接复制的配置模板与 Mermaid 流程图，帮助用户从基础概念走到高级代理编排与自动化流水线。

title: hacksider/Deep-Live-Cam
description_en: real time face swap and one-click video deepfake with only a single image
description_zh: Deep-Live-Cam 2.1 主打只用一张图片即可一键进行实时换脸与视频深度伪造，并将其定位为服务于 AI 生成媒体行业的创作工具。它声明内置检测以阻止处理裸露、血腥或战争等敏感内容，并强调用户需合法合规使用、涉及真人面孔须取得同意且公开标注为 deepfake。项目方表示会持续采取防滥用措施，必要时可能添加水印或关停项目，同时不对终端用户的不当行为负责。

title: OpenBB-finance/OpenBB
description_en: Financial data platform for analysts, quants and AI agents.
description_zh: OpenBB 的 Open Data Platform（ODP）是面向分析师、量化和 AI 代理的开源金融数据平台，帮助数据工程师把自有、授权和公共数据源接入到下游应用。它作为“连接一次，随处使用”的基础设施层，将数据统一暴露给 Python 环境、OpenBB Workspace 与 Excel、面向 AI 代理的 MCP 服务器以及 REST API。OpenBB Workspace 提供企业级可视化与 AI 代理能力，可通过在本地运行 ODP 的 FastAPI 后端并在 Workspace 的 Apps 里“Connect backend”进行连接与测试。

title: sherlock-project/sherlock
description_en: Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks
description_zh: 这段内容介绍了 Sherlock 项目：它可以按用户名在 400 多个社交网络上搜索并定位可能对应的账号，并把找到的结果按用户名分别保存到文本文件中。文中还提醒 ParrotOS 和 Ubuntu 24.04 的第三方维护包可能不可用，建议改用 pipx/pip 或 Docker，另外也提到可通过 Apify 的 Sherlock Actor 在云端免安装运行。整体是安装与使用说明的摘要，并附带项目致谢与许可信息。

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
description_en: The agent that grows with you
description_zh: Hermes Agent 是 Nous Research 推出的可自我改进 AI 代理，主打内置学习闭环，会从经验生成技能、在使用中迭代并通过记忆机制跨会话回忆与建立用户模型。它支持多种模型与接口（如 Nous Portal、OpenRouter、OpenAI 或自建端点）且可随时切换，无需改代码。还提供完整终端 TUI、定时自动化、并行子代理与多种运行环境（本地、Docker、SSH、Daytona、Modal 等），可在低成本 VPS 或云端按需运行。

title: Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode
description_en: Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code
description_zh: oh-my-claudecode（OMC）是面向 Claude Code 的多代理编排工具，主打“无需学习成本”，通过安装与简单设置后即可用 Team 模式按阶段流水线自动协作完成开发。它还提供“深度访谈”式的苏格拉底提问来澄清需求再写代码，并在较新版本中支持用 tmux 的 CLI worker 方式调度 Codex/Gemini 等外部工具协作。项目名为 oh-my-claudecode，但 npm 包名与仓库/插件命名不同，文本中未完整给出具体包名与安装命令细节。
